sitecustomize/getsitepackages.name: getsitepackages
sitecustomize/getsitepackages.description: Return a list containing all global site-packages directories. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: Return a list containing all global site-packages directories. Added in version 3.2.

sitecustomize/getuserbase.name: getuserbase
sitecustomize/getuserbase.description: Return the path of the user base directory, USER_BASE. If it is not initialized yet, this function will also set it, respecting PYTHONUSERBASE. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: Return the path of the user base directory, USER_BASE. If it is not initialized yet, this function will also set it, respecting PYTHONUSERBASE. Added in version 3.2.

sitecustomize/getusersitepackages.name: getusersitepackages
sitecustomize/getusersitepackages.description: Return the path of the user-specific site-packages directory, USER_SITE. If it is not initialized yet, this function will also set it, respecting USER_BASE. To determine if the user-specific site-packages was added to sys.path ENABLE_USER_SITE should be used. Added in version 3.2.
